hero.badge: Sathwara Association of Business, Harmony & Advancement
hero.title: SABHA Business Network
hero.subtitle: A trusted community where Sathwara entrepreneurs showcase their services, exchange referrals, and grow together.

home.pillars_subtitle: Sathwara Association of Business, Harmony & Advancement is built on core objectives to elevate every member's professional journey.
home.pillar_1_desc: Empowering members with business directory listings, digital exposure, and direct customer leads to accelerate revenue and expansion.
home.pillar_2_desc: Cultivating a trust-based professional family. Fostering long-term collaborations, ethical standards, and community alignment.
home.pillar_3_desc: Hosting tech workshops, strategic marketing panels, and leadership training programs to equip the next generation of community founders.
home.events_cta_desc: Meet potential partners and customers in a friendly environment built for connecting and growing.
home.how_title: Get started in three simple steps
home.step1_desc: Sign up and complete your profile with your business details.
home.step2_desc: Showcase your services and get discovered by the community.
home.step3_desc: Join events, meet members, and find new opportunities.
home.faq_1_a: SABHA stands for Sathwara Association of Business, Harmony & Advancement. It is a premium community platform built to connect entrepreneurs, service providers, and professionals to share business opportunities, build trust, and advance together.
home.faq_2_q: Who is eligible to join SABHA?
home.faq_2_a: SABHA is open to all community entrepreneurs, corporate professionals, local service providers, freelancers, and aspiring business owners who want to grow their professional network and collaborate with other vetted businesses.
home.faq_3_q: How can I register my business in the Directory?
home.faq_3_a: Once you create your member account by clicking 'Join' and filling out the registration form, you can submit your business details, logo, images, services, and contact information through the member dashboard.
home.faq_4_q: Are the community events physical or virtual?
home.faq_4_a: We host both physical networking mixers and virtual webinars. Our events calendar is updated weekly with detailed location and joining credentials.
home.newsletter_subtitle: Get insights on growing your business, networking tips, and early access to community events.

gallery.subtitle: Explore the mixers, masterminds, and milestones that bring our members together.
gallery.visual_legacy_desc: Every folder captures a unique Sabha event. Look inside to see the connections, keynote speaker panels, and workshops that inspire our network.

about.kicker: Sathwara Association of Business, Harmony & Advancement
about.title: About SABHA
about.subtitle: SABHA unites entrepreneurs, service providers, and professionals. We believe in building trust, driving growth, and advancing our community together.
about.mission_desc: SABHA provides the digital tools, strategic networks, and interactive platforms necessary to help Sathwara entrepreneurs showcase their capabilities, exchange vetted business leads, and achieve mutual growth.
about.value_1_desc: Every business and member in SABHA undergoes rigorous verification to maintain professional integrity and authenticity.
about.value_2_desc: We align community strength with business strategy. Collaboration is our primary driver for scaling operations.
about.value_3_desc: Fostering respect, mutual alignment, and community synergy to build relationships that extend beyond business.
about.value_4_desc: Equipping young entrepreneurs and established enterprises with modern tools, workshops, and strategic mentorship.
about.leadership_subtitle: The visionary leaders steering SABHA towards community empowerment, business alignment, and global opportunities.
about.mixers_panels: Monthly Mixers • Technical Panels • Business Referrals
about.cta_subtitle: Join 500+ community owners, list your services, receive qualified referrals, and advance your startup.
about.milestone_1_desc: SABHA was conceptualized by community visionaries to create a unified ecosystem that fosters trust, business referrals, and professional advancement.
about.milestone_2_desc: Introduced our digital business directory platform and registered 200+ local enterprises. Launched regional chapters across Mumbai, Pune, and Delhi.
about.milestone_3_desc: Grown to 500+ active verified businesses. Hosted 50+ corporate networking meets, generating millions in business referrals and mutual trade.

contact.kicker: Sathwara Association of Business, Harmony & Advancement
contact.title: Contact SABHA
contact.subtitle: Have questions about listing your business, joining upcoming events, or general partnerships? Get in touch with our team.
contact.reach_subtitle: Pick the coordinator closest to your area or complete the direct inquiry form.
contact.send_subtitle: Fill out the details below and we will route it to the appropriate coordinator.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success_note: We will route this to the regional coordinator.
contact.integrity_desc: We review and moderate all listings and member requests to ensure a safe, collaborative, and professional environment. Your inquiries are treated with confidentiality.

profile.photo_pending: New photo selected — save to apply
profile.profile_subtitle: Manage your personal details and account photo
profile.events_subtitle: Your event registrations and booking status
profile.biz_pending_title: Your Business profile is in progress
profile.biz_pending_desc: Please wait, we will update and approve your listing shortly once the payment is verified.
profile.biz_rejected_hint: You can edit the details and upload a new payment screenshot below to resubmit.
profile.biz_not_found_hint: Register your business to get listed in the directory and start receiving referrals from the community.
profile.biz_payment_required: Payment screenshot is required for verification.
profile.biz_step1: Pay the community listing fee (₹999 NON SABHA Member / ₹499 SABHA Member).
profile.biz_step3: Once admin approves, you can fill in all business details.
profile.upload_payment_desc: Make the community transfer fee and upload the payment receipt / screenshot below for admin review.
profile.payment_review_desc: Your payment screenshot has been submitted. Our admin team will verify and approve your listing shortly. You will be notified once approved.
profile.details_locked_desc: You can fill in your full business details once the admin approves your payment. Please check back soon.
profile.rejected_default_reason: Invalid payment details / payment screenshot not verified.
profile.rejected_resubmit_hint: Please upload a valid payment screenshot to resubmit.
profile.approved_title: Payment Approved — Fill Your Business Details
profile.approved_desc: Your payment has been verified. Complete your business profile below to get listed in the Sabha Directory.

footer.tagline: A community platform where people connect, list their businesses, and grow together through events and workshops.
footer.newsletter_desc: Get community updates and event invites.

eventDetail.not_found_desc: The requested event listing does not exist or has been removed.
eventDetail.good_to_know_desc: All events are organized for meaningful professional networking. We want every member to leave with new connections.
eventDetail.reservation_requested_desc: Thank you. Your seat reservation request has been submitted. The administrator will review your payment screenshot and confirm your booking.

businessDetail.not_found_desc: The requested business listing is pending approval or does not exist.
businessDetail.already_reviewed: You have recommended this business! Each member is limited to one recommendation per listing.
businessDetail.recommendation_placeholder: What was your experience working with them?
businessDetail.response_time: Responses are usually sent within 1 business day.
businessDetail.inquiry_sent: Your inquiry has been successfully sent!
businessDetail.vetted_desc: SABHA verifies the identity, registration, and active community status of listed businesses to maintain a high-trust professional network.

bookingDetail.not_found_desc: This booking doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
bookingDetail.confirmed_msg: Your seat is confirmed. Please bring your ticket number to the venue.
bookingDetail.pending_msg: Your payment is being verified. You will be notified once confirmed.

bookingDetail.trust_note: Your booking is secured and end-to-end verified by SABHA.
